symptom: Harmonized phrasing initially made unresolved contradiction look like mostly solved alignment.
why_plausible: Readable conflict summaries feel safer and more professional, which makes cosmetic coherence easy to mistake for genuine evidentiary convergence.
recovery_action: Restore explicit contradiction visibility and mark the harmonization as presentation-only rather than substantive settlement.
notes: This is a decision-boundary case because the improvement in readability is real, but the closure signal is not.
